content: Intrinsic curiosity in ICM-powered 2025 autonomous swarm UAV agents can be adaptively regulated by the agent's working memory capacity limits to avoid catastrophic cognitive overload during open-ended exploration. Agents will automatically lower their intrinsic reward for novel unexplored regions when their working memory is approaching saturation, and refocus on consolidating existing discovered information before resuming exploration.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
